name: The Minotaur

visual_attributes.morphology: Body of a man with the head and tail of a bull
visual_attributes.texture: Smooth human skin with coarse bull hair on the head and tail
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Human body with bull head and tail attached

domain_specific_visual.Classical_art_representation: Often depicted at the center of the Labyrinth

domain_specific_functional.Mythological_role: Represents the consequences of defying the gods
domain_specific_functional.Cultural_symbolism: Embodiment of monstrosity and human-animal hybridity

relationships.description: Born from Pasiphaë and a bull due to Poseidon's curse
Held within the Labyrinth constructed by Daedalus
Killed by the hero Theseus with the help of Ariadne

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents the dangers of hubris and the consequences of divine retribution

contrastive_constraints: NOT a creature with a human head and bull body
